## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is `feat/…`, `fix/…`, `chore/…`, `docs/…`, or `refactor/…`
- [ ] Commit messages contain **no** "Claude" or "Anthropic" attribution (the `commit-msg` hook enforces this)
- [ ] `apps/web/public/logs/index.html` has a new card describing this change — *or* this PR qualifies as `chore:` / `docs:` and the exemption applies
- [ ] If UI changed, I've verified it locally on `:8787`
- [ ] No secrets in the diff
